subcodes.title: Words to newspaper reporters, spoken on 1912-09-18
subcodes.first_line: The laws and commandments of God are of two kinds: one set is composed of those essential spiritual principles which are the basis for human prosperity
subcodes.first_line_orig: مسائل و احکام دین الله بر دو قسم است قسمی اساس اصلی احکام روحانیه و اصول سعادت بشریه و تحسین اخلاق
subcodes.subjects: @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
